ffmpeg_checker.warn_unknown_ver: Failed to accurately parse ffmpeg version. If errors persist, please check the documentation and update ffmpeg to the latest version.
ffmpeg_checker.tip_generic: ffmpeg execution failed. Please check the logs. If the parameters are correct, we recommend checking the documentation and updating ffmpeg to the latest or officially recommended version.

subembed.title: VR Hard Subtitle Embed Tool
subembed.mode_help_msg:
Both Eyes
Subtitles are shown in both left and right eye images. You need to set the subtitle display distance in meters. This distance should match the scene depth around the subtitles in your video. Otherwise, long viewing may cause eye strain or dizziness. This is called vergence-accommodation conflict.

Left Eye Only / Right Eye Only
Subtitles are shown to only one eye. Everyone has a dominant eye, similar to a dominant hand. Showing subtitles only to the dominant eye lets the brain read mainly through that eye, which can feel easier and does not require setting a distance. However, it may trigger binocular rivalry: the brain switches between the two eye images, so subtitles may flicker or appear/disappear.
subembed.original: Original Left Eye (drag subtitle area, smaller area = smaller subtitles)
subembed.select_video_ass: Please select a video and an ASS/SRT subtitle file
subembed.zoom_hint: Mouse wheel to zoom, hold left button to pan

subtitle.title: Japanese Batch Subtitle Tools
subtitle.lbl_rm_sub_note: Convert MKV back to MP4 by stripping soft subtitles.
subtitle.chk_rm_subdirs: Search all subdirectories for MKV files
subtitle.chk_delete_mkv: Delete MKV file after successful restore
subtitle.msg_stop_wait: Stop requested. Waiting for current chunk to finish before stopping...
subtitle.chk_search_subdirs: Search all subdirectories for video/audio files
subtitle.chk_skip_if_exists: Skip videos that already have JP subtitles (including xx.jp.srt and xx.srt)
subtitle.chk_use_gpu: Try GPU Acceleration (requires NVIDIA GPU with CUDA12+, cuBLAS and cuDNN9)
subtitle.lbl_ass_info: Note: It's recommended to convert bilingual SRT to ASS for advanced styles. Only supported by Skybox VR. .ass style templates are in config/subtitle_ass_templates.txt
subtitle.chk_search_subdirs_ass: Search all subdirectories for .srt files (excluding .jp.srt original Japanese subtitles)
subtitle.chk_search_subdirs_srt: Search all subdirectories for mp4/mkv files
subtitle.chk_replace_original: After adding the file, replace the original file with the new mkv file
subtitle.chk_skip_if_has_sub: Skip video files that already have embedded subtitles
subtitle.chk_prefer_ass: Prefer embedding ASS subtitles (only Skybox VR player displays correctly)
subtitle.lbl_srt_info: Browse the mp4/mkv files in the directory. If a same-named srt/ass file exists, it will be added to the file as soft subtitle.\nNote: MKV format does not support generating passthrough videos using VR Video Passthrough Server.
subtitle.lbl_listen_info: Please first confirm Subtitle Generation and Subtitle Translation work. This tab uses the AI configuration saved in Subtitle Translation by default.
subtitle.chk_listen_search_videos: Search all subdirectories for video files
subtitle.chk_keep_jp_srt: Keep the .jp.srt Japanese subtitle after translation
subtitle.btn_test_api: Test API & Save Safely to System Keychain
subtitle.btn_delete_key: Delete API Key from System Keychain
subtitle.chk_dubbing_optimized: Optimize translation for simultaneous interpretation or dubbing
subtitle.msg_key_deleted: API Key deleted from system keyring.
subtitle.lbl_rank_info: Note: This tool is used to roughly evaluate the quality of Japanese speech transcription, such as comparing different denoising levels, different ASR models, and different software. The scoring results are for reference only. Higher statistical scores do not necessarily mean better subtitles, please evaluate comprehensively with other metrics.
subtitle.cuda_dialog_msg:
To achieve GPU acceleration, you need cuBLAS and cuDNN libraries.

1. Click the button below to download the latest independent package (e.g., cuBLAS.and.cuDNN_CUDA12_win_v3.7z).
2. Extract the files directly into the software's root directory (where the .exe or main python script is located).
3. Restart the tool to enable high-speed GPU generation.
subtitle.warn_path: >> Please refer to the 'readme.txt' in the same folder for step-by-step installation instructions.
